author: thomasbrezinski
description: Carry over incomplete todos from Daily Notes grouped by headers, with support for nesting and flexible todo states.

releases.author: thomasbrezinski

releases.author: thomasbrezinski
releases.description:
Includes bug fix for parsing daily note keys that affected parsing todays from previous number of existing notes, rather than days.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/thomasbrezinski/obsidian-nested-daily-todos/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: thomasbrezinski
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add support for looking for number of prev todos instead of days by @thomasbrezinski in https://github.com/thomasbrezinski/obsidian-nested-daily-todos/pull/3
* Small update to README now that plugin is published, and spaces by @thomasbrezinski in https://github.com/thomasbrezinski/obsidian-nested-daily-todos/pull/4

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/thomasbrezinski/obsidian-nested-daily-todos/compare/1.0.3...1.1.0
